function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to your design partner.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox write mentally per checklist: attachments are all files read in this run and ordered newest-first by invoice date; recipient matches canonical Miles email; subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next cleanup step is deleting processed inbox file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with evidence and security assessment
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written successfully to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Inbox item handled and deleted. To safely reference the created outbox file in completion, I should read it first so grounding refs remain valid.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md successfully.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was to handle next inbox item. Completed full inbox-processing flow: read workflows/rules, processed lowest inbox file, verified sender identity via canonical entity record, resolved design partner linkage to Nina via canonical cast + invoice related_entity fields, selected oldest 4 of 5 linked invoices (by dates: 2025-10-06, 2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2026-01-17), wrote outbound draft with attachments ordered newest-first per mandatory outbox rule, deleted processed inbox file. No security triggers found (no external URL, no sender mismatch, financial docs returned to verified requester).
next_step.observation: Read back the created outbox email file and confirmed expected recipient, subject, and four invoice attachment paths.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I processed 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, verified the sender as Miles via canonical entity data, identified the design-partner-linked invoices (Nina Schreiber), prepared an outbound draft to miles@novak.example with the requested oldest 4 linked invoices attached, and then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read required nested AGENTS/workflows before acting, used canonical inbox header + canonical entity email for identity, applied outbox one-write discipline and newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted inbox only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request asked for oldest 4 invoices linked to design partner. Sender from inbox header (miles@novak.example) matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Design partner linkage resolved to Nina and corroborated in invoice records via related_entity 'Nina Schreiber'; five linked invoices were found, and the four oldest were selected and attached. Outbound draft was written in the correct outbox lane and the inbox item was deleted after completion.
completed_steps_laconic: searched invoices for linked entity and read selected invoice files
